field.label: Name
field.help: Nebula certificate name / hostname (embedded in the certificate).

field.label: Description
field.help: Human-readable label for this host certificate. Defaults to the name if left empty.

field.label: Certificate Authority
field.help: The Nebula CA that will sign this host certificate.

field.label: CA Passphrase
field.help: Required when the selected CA's private key is encrypted. Supplied per signing operation and never stored.

field.label: Public Key (CSR)
field.help: Optional: paste a node's Nebula public key (from `nebula-cert keygen`) to sign it as a CSR — the private key stays on the node and is never sent to or stored on this CA (recommended). Leave empty to generate the key here and download it.

field.label: Networks
field.help: CIDR(s) assigned to this node, e.g. 10.10.0.1/24. Add each as a tag.

field.label: Unsafe Networks
field.help: Optional unsafe (excluded) CIDRs. Add each as a tag.

field.label: Groups
field.help: Optional group membership. Add each as a tag.

field.label: Duration (days)
field.help: Days the certificate is valid. Leave empty to expire just before the signing CA (recommended).
